name: RFISandbox
description: PHP 5.x script sandbox built on top of [funcall](https://pecl.php.net/package/funcall). Tool: https://monkey.org/~jose/software/rfi-sandbox/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #617 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map RFISandbox output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved RFISandbox output file to parse instead of running it live.
